task_completion.description: Open the Landsat multispectral image in ESA SNAP
task_completion.visual_evidence: ESA SNAP application is open, and the Product Explorer panel shows the 'landsat_multispectral' product loaded.
Band Math or Virtual Band dialog showing the name 'TC_Brightness' and the expression '(0.30 * band_4) + (0.28 * band_3) + (0.47 * band_2) + (0.51 * band_1)'.
Band Math or Virtual Band dialog showing the name 'TC_Greenness' and the expression '(-0.28 * band_4) - (0.24 * band_3) + (0.54 * band_2) - (0.06 * band_1)'.
Band Math or Virtual Band dialog showing the name 'TC_Wetness' and the expression '(0.15 * band_4) + (0.20 * band_3) + (0.33 * band_2) - (0.65 * band_1)'.

task_completion.description: Save the product in BEAM-DIMAP format
task_completion.visual_evidence: Save Product dialog or file explorer showing 'tasseled_cap.dim' being saved in the '/home/ga/snap_exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the product as a GeoTIFF
task_completion.visual_evidence: Export dialog or file explorer showing 'tasseled_cap.tif' being exported to the '/home/ga/snap_exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Export an RGB image view as a PNG
task_completion.visual_evidence: RGB Image Profile dialog showing Red mapped to TC_Brightness, Green to TC_Greenness, and Blue to TC_Wetness, and an export dialog showing 'tct_visualization.png' being saved to '/home/ga/snap_exports/'.

integrity.description: Agent used the ESA SNAP GUI to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ESA SNAP graphical interface (menus, dialogs, Product Explorer) rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not use scripts to bypass GUI operations
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of Python scripts, shell scripts, or SNAP command-line tools (gpt) being used to generate the outputs.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely created the outputs through the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The creation of virtual bands and export processes are visible in the SNAP interface, rather than files simply being moved or renamed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is located at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The expected output files are /home/ga/snap_exports/tasseled_cap.dim, /home/ga/snap_exports/tasseled_cap.tif, and /home/ga/snap_exports/tct_visualization.png.
